scripts.clean: rimraf .turbo dist build out coverage tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.regenerate-cdn:decoration-atlas: node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/extract-decoration-sprites.ts --input apps/garden/data/sriptes/grass_grass_examples.png --output-dir apps/garden/data/sriptes/extracted/ground-cover/grass --min-alpha 24 --min-pixels 1400 --merge-gap 48 --padding 24 --limit 8 && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/extract-decoration-sprites.ts --input apps/garden/data/sriptes/desert_grass_examples.png --output-dir apps/garden/data/sriptes/extracted/ground-cover/desert --min-alpha 24 --min-pixels 1400 --merge-gap 48 --padding 24 --limit 8 && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/create-ground-flower-sprites.ts --output-dir apps/garden/data/sriptes/extracted/ground-cover/flower && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/create-decoration-atlas.ts --input-dir apps/garden/data/sriptes/extracted/ground-cover --output-png apps/garden/public/assets/sprites/decorations/ground-cover-v2.atlas.png --padding 16 --size 1024 --columns 5 --rows 5 && node --experimental-strip-types ./scripts/sync-decoration-atlas.ts --source apps/garden/public/assets/sprites/decorations --target apps/www/public/assets/sprites/decorations --base ground-cover-v2.atlas
